calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with Zenobia Millet (Co-Administrator).

Mr. Peterson asked that his Client be paid the full statutory fees stating that she did the bulk of the work, that the other Co-Administrator was difficult to work with and that Ms. Millet felt that she earned it. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Continued To Jan-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for Zenobia Millet.

Mr. Peterson requested a continuance stating that the Examiner was requesting quite a bit of information and that he needed to amend the petition. The matter was continued to December 14, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Continued To Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Continued To Oct-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar

Petition To Sign Listing Agreement For Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with Zenobia Millet (Co-Administrator). Emanuel George, Jr. (Co-Administrator) in Pro Per.

Mr. Peterson reported that Mr. George had signed the listing agreement. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition To Sign Listing Agreement For Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for Zenobia Millet (Co-Administrator).

Mr. Peterson stated that the Brother and Sister were the Co-Administrators and that the Brother wanted to buy out the Sister but that they could not agree on the terms. In addition, he stated that his client wanted to sell, but that the Brother was not cooperating. The Court requested a re-appraisal of the property. The Court issued an Order to Show Cause ("OSC") for Emanuel George Jr. to appear on August 12, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to demonstrate his ability to buy the property or cooperate in the listing of the property. The petition before the Court was also continued to August 12, 2008.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Continued To Mar-29-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
